releases.headline: TOTS solver fix
releases.summary: Improved solver logic to recognise TOTS requirements and club players.
details: Improved solver logic to recognise TOTS requirements and club players.
Added a button to quickly view the extensions source code in the global settings menu.

releases.headline: TOTS solver fix
releases.summary: Improved solver logic to recognise TOTS requirements and club players.
details: Improved solver logic to recognise TOTS requirements and club players.
Added a button to quickly view the extensions source code in the global settings menu.

releases.headline: Solver and player pool fixes
releases.summary: Improved solver logic and fixed the SBC Storage and Use Unassigned settings.
details: Improved solver logic so it handles SBCs more reliably.
Fixed Only Storage so it properly uses players that match your SBC storage.
Fixed Use Unassigned so unassigned players can be fetched, solved with, and applied correctly.
WE ARE OFFICIALLY OPEN SOURCE!!!  https://github.com/just-a-weird-guy/AutoPilot-SBC

releases.headline: More reliable solving and smarter fetching
releases.summary: Made the solver more reliable, improved player fetching, and cleaned up small UI details.
details: Added a better fallback flow so the solver recovers more reliably solve difficult challenges.
Improved player fetching to allow for more intelligent triggers.
Made small UI improvements and cleanup tweaks.

releases.headline: Fixes and patching
releases.summary: Cleaned up recent issues and patched smaller rough edges across the extension.
details: Added a ratings slider to the sequence solver
Made small UI tweaks for consistency.
Fixed multi solver not syncing with global settings.

releases.headline: Sequence Solver fixes
releases.summary: Improved Sequence Solver feedback, progress, and hub reliability.
details: Made failure messages clearer.
Progress now updates during active solve phases.
Improved handling for refreshed or relisted SBC challenges.
Fixed the missing Sequence Solver button bug in the SBC tab.

releases.headline: Better sequence runs and easier solver control
releases.summary: Made Sequence Solver easier to follow and added more control over who the solver can use.
details: Sequence Solver now shows the exact players used for each completed challenge.
Sequence Solver now lets you flip through completed challenge entries inside the execution panel.
Added local league and nation exclusions so you can block or allow them for a specific solve without changing your global settings.
TOTW cards can now be controlled separately from the main special-card filter.
Fixed exclusion panels so they show the right blocked items, stay in sync, and scroll properly.

releases.headline: Sequence Solver is live
releases.summary: Plan and solve multiple SBCs in one run.
details: Added the new Sequence Solver.
Save sequence plans and run them in order.
Added plan loops, step loops, and execution progress.

releases.headline: Changelog and update notes
releases.summary: Added a changelog popup for installs and updates.
details: Added a changelog popup after installs and updates.
Added a Changelog button in Settings.
Saved viewed status so it only opens once per version.

releases.headline: Speed and solver improvements
releases.summary: Improved player lookup and squad applying speed.
details: Improved player and squad applying speed.
Improved set and multi-solve stability.
Cleaner solver controls and feedback.
